word: H3648 - כָּמַר - kâmar - kaw-mar' - Be black

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּמר

Transliteration: kâmar

Phonetic: kaw-mar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to yearn, be kindled, be black (hot), grow warm and tender, be or grow hot, become hot, become emotionally agitated
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to grow warm and tender
      2. to be or grow hot

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 993,994,995

Part(s) of speech: Verb
